ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-29-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (administrator) Dolores Jones.

The Court stated that the issue is whether everything possible to track down the family has been done. Ms. Ng reported that she has made her best effort and that it has been difficult to find people, that they are unable to find relatives on the maternal side due to the common name. The Court stated that it recognizes the tremendous effort and amount of work that went into this and granted the petition to determine entitlement to distribution of decedents estate, signing the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Continued To May-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (605 - 605 1/2 Fell Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Dolores Jones.

The Court noted that a opposition was filed by George Marshall, that he raised the issue of no evidence of Ms. Jones being appointed as Personal Representative of the Estate and that the sale price is not within 90% of the inventory/re-appraisal. The Court stated that the file reflects that Ms. Jones is the Personal Representative, that the re-appraisal filed March 17, 2011 shows that the amount bid is within 90% of the re-appraised value and that the sale will go forward. The sale was confirmed at $640,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $280,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
